title: Payton Pritchard’s huge night propels Celtics over 76ers in Game 4 blowout: 8 takeaways
author: Tom Westerholm
bullets: Boston Celtics “The amount of fans we have, how well they travel, it’s just something I’ve been fortunate enough to experience my entire career,” Jayson Tatum said.
“We understand it’s not like that everywhere, so it’s great to be a part of.
” Payton Pritchard and Jayson Tatum celebrate during the second half of the Game 4 win against the 76ers.

title: What Chad Tracy said after his first win as Red Sox manager
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: Boston Red Sox "It's been a whirlwind.
" Chad Tracy won his first game as Red Sox interim manager on Sunday.
Jamie Sabau/Getty Images ShareSend this article to your social connections.

title: Crew member missing after falling from cruise ship near Cape Cod
author: Carson Lyle
bullets: Local News "The safety, security, and well-being of our crew is our highest priority.
Our thoughts are with the crew member's family during this difficult time," a spokesperson for Norwegian Cruise Line said.
A Norwegian Cruise Line ship.

title: Mass. police officer put on leave amid domestic violence allegations
author: Carson Lyle
bullets: Local News Shawn Valliere, 53, allegedly put a gun into his mouth and asked his wife to pull the trigger, held his wife at gunpoint, and abused alcohol, and cocaine, police wrote in a statement of facts.
ShareSend this article to your social connections.
A Shrewsbury police officer was suspended and is facing criminal charges after he allegedly pointed a gun at his wife and threatened to shoot her.

title: Bruins need to look themselves in mirror after embarrassing performance on home ice
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: Boston Bruins “Man to man in here, if we're not f------ embarrassed with what just happened, then I don't know what to say.
" David Pastrnak and the Bruins are now on the brink of a season-ending loss.
Matthew J.

title: Mike Minogue wins GOP endorsement for governor in landslide
author: Molly Farrar
bullets: Politics Fellow candidate Brian Shortsleeve also garnered enough votes to make it on the ballot for September's primary, while Mike Kennealy ended his campaign.
Mike Minogue candidate for governor spoke to the media briefly at the Massachusetts GOP Convention in Worcester on April, 25, 2026.
Jonathan Wiggs/The Boston Globe ShareSend this article to your social connections.

title: Joe Mazzulla gives his take on Alex Cora’s firing by Red Sox
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: Boston Celtics “One day you’re there, the next day you’re not.
That’s how it goes.
” Joe Mazzulla is now the longest-tenured in Boston.

title: What Marco Sturm said about Jeremy Swayman yelling at the Bruins bench in blowout loss​
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: Boston Bruins "It was not his fault today, I can tell you that.
I felt bad for him.
" Jeremy Swayman was not thrilled after getting the hook in Game 4.
